description: PROP-023 test (step1-prepare-save-request.test.ts lines 277-295) remains tautological. It asserts result.value.kind === 'empty-discarded' AND result.value.kind !== 'validated' -- both assertions test the same discriminant on the same value and are logically redundant. The actual PROP-023 claim is that EditingSessionState does NOT transition to 'saving' on the empty-discarded path. Since prepareSaveRequest has no access to state transitions, this property can only be meaningfully tested at the pipeline level by verifying that ports.beginAutoSave is NOT called. No such pipeline-level test exists. This was FIND-007 in Sprint 1 and remains unresolved.
